positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a mystical woodland forest at twilight. The scene features silhouettes of large, fantastical flora, such as glowing mushroom clusters and bioluminescent ferns, framing a central, gently curved archway. A stylized, celestial creature—like a graceful fox or a stag—is subtly visible within the arch, surrounded by cascading vines and luminous spores. The overall style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with modern Japanese woodblock print aesthetics. Use a rich, deep color palette dominated by indigo, teal, emerald green, and pops of luminous gold and lavender. High contrast between the deep shadows and the glowing elements. Centered composition, suitable for a clean, repetitive repeat pattern or a single torso print on dark fabric. Clean vector lines, highly detailed, volumetric lighting, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noise, grain, text, watermark, signature, cartoon, photorealism, poor anatomy, extra limbs, asymmetrical, dirty, cluttered background
